conflict_pairs.description: Fundamental aesthetic contradiction — clean restraint vs. abundant decoration
Price positioning conflict — premium exclusivity vs. mass accessibility
Design longevity tension — enduring classics vs. moment-driven fashion
Occasion dressing tension — structured occasion wear vs. relaxed everyday
Tonal tension — subversive disruption vs. established convention
Values conflict — ethical production vs. rapid throughput model
Production philosophy tension — handcrafted tradition vs. engineered performance

tension_contexts.trend-aware-classics: Brand uses timeless silhouettes with current-season colors/details. Trendy aesthetics are acceptable IF the silhouette is structured and enduring.
tension_contexts.fast-moving-capsules: Brand releases frequent short-run capsules. Trendy aesthetics are core to the strategy, not a liability.
tension_contexts.intentionally-hybrid: Brand deliberately spans categories (e.g., luxury streetwear, formal-casual). Score based on execution quality, not category purity.
tension_contexts.accessible-luxe: Brand offers elevated quality at accessible price points. Price conflicts should be scored as 'yellow' tension, not hard fails.
